## Description
Briefly describe what this PR does and why it is needed.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Infrastructure change (Terraform, Kubernetes, etc.)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Checklist
Please verify the following before submitting your PR:
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] My code passes local linting (`pre-commit run --all-files`).
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (if applicable).
- [ ] Secrets scan is clean (no hardcoded secrets).

## Related Issues
Fixes # (issue number)
